motion.heroEntrance: Staggered fade-up for typography, floating animation for 3D element
motion.scrollEffects: Parallax on images, smooth reveal on section entry
motion.hoverStates: Subtle scale (1.02), border brightness increase, ambient shadow

3d_strategy.implementation: In the Hero section, render a `<Canvas>`. Use `<Float>` to suspend a stylized smartphone mesh (or a minimalist rounded box representing the app) with a dark `<MeshPhysicalMaterial>` (high metalness, low roughness, clearcoat). Light the scene with dramatic rim lighting and a spot light to create a premium cinematic feel.
3d_strategy.fallback: If 3D fails, fallback to a high-quality static image with a subtle Framer Motion float.

components.navbar: Glassmorphism header `backdrop-blur-xl bg-zinc-950/70 border-b border-white/10`. Sticky top z-50. Brand text left, nav center, CTA right.
components.button: Solid white background, black text for primary. Sharp edges or minimal radius (rounded-md). Industrial feel.
components.bentoGrid: For Features. Use Mode A: Tetris Grid. Direct children wrapped in Framer Motion. Surfaces are zinc-900 with 1px border-white/10. Add `p-8` inside cards.
components.marquee: For screenshots gallery. Use react-fast-marquee or Framer Motion loop. Gap-8. No standard scrollbars.
components.accordion: For FAQ. Minimalist, 1px bottom border per item. No backgrounds. Use Shadcn Accordion.

sections.name: Hero

content.description: Bradwear: experience your professional uniform. Keseimbangan antara fungsionalitas kerja dan gaya urban modern. Spesialis kemeja kerja dan seragam profesional dari Tasikmalaya.

sections.layout: Two columns on desktop: Left side typography, Right side R3F Canvas for 3D phone showcase.

sections.name: About

content.text: Dibuat dengan standar kualitas tinggi di Tasikmalaya untuk Indonesia. Setiap produk Bradwear dirancang untuk daya tahan maksimal tanpa mengorbankan kenyamanan.

sections.layout: Generous spacing `py-32`. Large text centered, with a dark moody fashion portrait acting as a parallax background or side image.

sections.name: Features

items.title: Spesialis Kemeja Kerja
items.desc: Koleksi kemeja kerja dengan potongan presisi yang menciptakan tampilan profesional sekaligus tegas.

items.title: Kualitas Premium
items.desc: Terbuat dari bahan pilihan yang tangguh untuk aktivitas tinggi namun tetap sejuk dipakai.

items.title: Koleksi Terlaris
items.desc: Temukan seri favorit seperti Brad V-1, V-2, dan Ventura Series, dipercaya oleh ribuan pengguna.

items.title: Pesan Kustom Mudah
items.desc: Integrasi pemesanan langsung mempermudah mendapatkan produk atau seragam instansi impian Anda.

items.title: Desain Modern
items.desc: Perpaduan streetwear dan gaya kerja formal yang membuat Anda tetap keren di luar jam kantor.

sections.layout: Bento Grid (Tetris Mode A). Asymmetrical layout, high visual tension.

sections.name: Screenshots
sections.layout: Full-width Marquee of 8 app screenshots to create a 'Kinetic Texture'. Overflow hidden.

sections.name: Download Steps
sections.layout: Vertical list with massive background numbers (1, 2, 3) in `text-white/5`. 'Cara Download' guide.

sections.name: Footer
sections.layout: Massive typography 'BRADWEAR' (text-[10vw] to text-[15vw]). Contact links: +6282319226530, gilangsetianugraha9@gmail.com, website.

rules.buttons: Do not use generic blue buttons. Primary CTA must be stark white with black text. Include hover states that invert or glow.
rules.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button')
rules.components: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layout (grid/flex). Use Shadcn only for interactive components like Accordion for FAQ.
rules.fonts: Use 'Clash Display' for headings (via import or local) and 'Satoshi' for body. Do not use Inter for headings.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize React project with Vite if not done.
3. Build layout exactly as per guidelines.
4. Ensure Hero section has a 3D Canvas element displaying a premium mockup.
5. Connect all images directly from the URLs provided in the media object.
